name: line-swap
title: Line Swap
description: A masked full-line beat replacement: line A holds center then exits up through an overflow-hidden mask as line B enters bottom-up on the same beat, with an optional accent underline drawing beneath one word of line B.
evidence: Wave J2-5: generalizes flagship frame 01, the overflow-hidden mask slot with a single restrained beat replacement and a scaleX underline draw

variables.label: Line A
variables.description: First line; holds center inside the mask, then exits up on the swap beat.

variables.label: Line B
variables.description: Replacement line; enters bottom-up on the swap beat and holds.

variables.label: Swap at
variables.description: Second (from mount start) of the beat replacement. Clamped so the swap and underline complete before any exit.

variables.label: Underline word
variables.description: First case-insensitive substring match in line B gets the accent underline after landing. Empty disables it.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Underline color from the contract token map.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the landed line holds until the frame cuts.
